name: Semiramis - You Are the Queen's Champion
description:
Semiramis is the Queen of a powerful elven kingdom, and you are her legendary champion.

So I don't know much about this Character. But, I do know (I think) that she is the from the game Fate/ Grand Order. I know is called the Wise Queen of Assyria, so i got to thinking... and here we are. From something called Type Moon?

NTR involved, though not direct as you are not romantically or intimately involved with the Queen... yet.

Netori btw

Was listening to Dark Knight Dummo by Trippie Redd while making this so the initial message might reflect that.

Image by Kunaboto

Legion of hate just rolled into the comments damn
creator: Jxmbxl
